labels.name: Design
labels.description: The issue is related to UI/UX design or layout problems.

labels.name: Documentation
labels.description: The issue is related to missing or outdated documentation.

labels.name: Duplication
labels.description: This issue, or pull request, already exists!

labels.name: Enhancement
labels.description: Similar to feature requests, but for improving existing features rather than adding new ones.

labels.name: Feature Request
labels.description: This label is for suggestions or requests for new features.

labels.name: In Progress
labels.description: Signals that someone is actively working on the issue.

labels.name: Needs Review
labels.description: Signals that someone needs to review the issue or that the team must give feedback.

labels.name: Optimization
labels.description: The issue is related to optimising performance or resource usage.

labels.name: Question
labels.description: Signals that someone needs clarification rather than bug reports or feature requests.

labels.name: Security
labels.description: To highlight security-related issues that need to be addressed promptly.

labels.name: Testing
labels.description: This indicates that the issue is being tested.

labels.name: Won't Fix
labels.description: Indicates that the issue has been identified but will not be addressed for some reason.
